mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in FEDFUNDS transmits through lower discount rates and easier financial conditions, lifting S&P 500 prices over the next 20 trading days when the rate cut is part of an easing cycle rather than a one-off move.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not positive more than 55% of the time when FEDFUNDS trends lower for three consecutive months, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above recent levels signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing equity risk premia to widen and S&P 500 forward returns to turn negative over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases, or if the sign of the signal is unstable across any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A synchronized acceleration in RSAFS and GDPC1 indicates stronger final demand and revenue momentum, which supports positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through improved earnings expectations.
failure_condition: Reject if positive joint growth in RSAFS and GDPC1 does not coincide with above-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term adds no predictive value relative to either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: An upside surprise in INDPRO during a broad manufacturing rebound signals improving capacity utilization and cyclically stronger earnings, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if short-horizon SPX returns are not positive after INDPRO monthly gains above 0.5%, or if the effect disappears once broad market volatility is controlled for.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains low, real policy rates fall and investors expect easier liquidity conditions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL inflation rises above FEDFUNDS by more than 1.0pp
failure_condition: Reject if high-inflation/low-rate episodes do not lead to higher 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction signal is negative across any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A deterioration in HOUST marks weakening housing demand and a broader slowdown in private-sector activity, which should forecast negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if housing contraction episodes are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the signal has no incremental value after controlling for UNRATE.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle labor regime, rising PAYEMS while UNRATE is already elevated signals labor stabilization rather than recession deepening, supporting a positive S&P 500 reaction over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition is not followed by positive short-horizon SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if PAYEMS gains are positive but the signal vanishes when UNRATE is not high.

mechanism_narrative: When GDPC1 remains positive but RSAFS weakens, final demand is decelerating before it appears in broader output, and equities should fall over the next 60 trading days as earnings revisions turn down.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth stays positive while RSAFS growth turns negative for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if the divergence condition does not precede negative 60-day SPX returns, or if the interaction signal is weaker than either GDPC1 or RSAFS alone in walk-forward testing.
